title: Cold Biomes Only
description: Challenge yourself by making the world only cold biomes. Great for a hardcore winter challenge!
body:
# Cold Biomes Only
A datapack that makes the world only cold biomes.

I am new to datapacks so expect a lot of issues. Join the discord to report any issues you find!


<details>
<summary>Biomes</summary>

- Deep Frozen Ocean
- Frozen Ocean
- Frozen Peaks
- Ice Spikes
- Snowy Beach
- Snowy Slopes
- Snowy Taiga
- Dripstone Caves
- Deepdark
</details>

## FAQ
**Does this work on a server?**
Yes. Go into your servers folders and go to `world -> datapacks` and put the datapack there. This datapack works multiplayer so play with however many people you would like!

## Support us!
Join my Minecraft server **ZoneRush.minekeep.gg** for a unique PvP gamemode!
